ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-04-2022 Off Calendar

DEFAULT HEARING (PROVE UP)
Off Calendar Dec-07-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Prove-Up Hearing as to defaulted defendants Generocity Capital LLC, a Delaware limited liability company, and David Levy.
Dept. 514. Judge: Murlene J. Randle. Clerk: K. Dougherty. Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 10:10 a.m.

Craig Ramsdell, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Michael Engmann, who was placed under oath and testified.
Both Messrs. Ramsdell and Engmann appeared via ZOOM for this morning's hearing.
No appearance by defendants Generocity Capital LLC, a Delaware limited liability company, or David Levy.

Plaintiff's Complaint for Breach of Contract and Breach of the Covenant of Good Faith and Fair Dealing was filed on October 10, 2018.
Substitute service of plaintiff's Summons, Complaint and accompanying documents on defendant Generocity Capital LLC occurred on October 25, 2018, and was effectuated on November 4, 2018.
Personal service of plaintiff's Summons, Complaint and accompanying documents on defendant David Levy on August 7, 2019.
Default as to defendant Generocity Capital LLC was entered on September 11, 2019.
Default as to defendant David Levy was entered on September 19, 2019.
DOE defendants were dismissed today, December 7, 2021.

Plaintiff Michael Engmann submits the following exhibit for the Court's review:
Exhibit 1: Promissory Note ("Ranch Note") dated March, 2017...........................ID/EVID

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Michael Engmann, and against the defaulted defendants Generocity Capital LLC, a Delaware limited liability company, and David Levy, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $2,350,000.00.
Prejudgment Interest - $943,000.00.
Costs - $435.00.

Total - $3,293,435.00.

Counsel for plaintiff shall prepare the proposed Judgment and submit same to the Court for review and signature.

Plaintiff STIPULATES to the return of the exhibit.

Proceedings concluded at 10:23 a.m.

Application For Writ Of Prejudgment Attachment Against Generocity Capital Llc
Off Calendar Nov-30-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF MICHAEL ENGMANN's Application For Writ Of Prejudgment Attachment Against Generocity Capital Llc.

Plaintiff Michael Engmann's application for writ of prejudgment attachment against Defendant Generocity Capital, LLC is GRANTED. No opposition filed and good cause shown.

The Court will sign the proposed order submitted with the moving papers.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/RBU)
